programmes.show_description: The Body Snatcher. A headless body is found in a suitcase in the Peak District. The investigation uncovers a gruesome attempt at a complete identity theft. S1, Ep3
Jigsaw Killer. When a torso is discovered in a suitcase, police link it to other body parts found nearby. An investigation unearths a gruesome tale of greed and depravity. S1, Ep4
The Wrong Woman. In 2017, Alisha Canales-McGuire was shot dead. Detectives can find no reason why anyone would kill Alisha until CCTV leads to a tangled murder plot. S9, Ep19
Not A Social Person. When a motorist shoots Whitney Gray, detectives follow a trail of CCTV to track down the suspect car - only to discover that the killer is on the run. S9, Ep20

Presumed Dead. Three cases illustrating the extreme measures investigators take to catch a killer when a missing person is presumed dead but no body can be found. S4, Ep6
Cold Cases. Investigates murder cases that took a decade or more to solve and how detectives can solve such cases when clues have become scarce. S4, Ep8
Dangerous Takedown. In 1997 two burglars broke into a home and shot at a police officer. One year later clues to the location of the suspects are revealed. S6, Ep14
Inside The Bureau. When a bank manager was unable to open the bank vault, the FBI was called in, revealing a sophisticated burglary with estimated losses of $8 million. S6, Ep15
Rachel Williams/Thomas Edwards. A woman's life hangs in the balance after she escapes a controlling relationship. Plus, a family are left devastated as a result of dangerous driving. S5, Ep4
Together Forever, Forever Together. A teenager who isn't allowed to date falls in love with a senior at school. They go to extreme lengths to be together and it ends in disaster. S4, Ep7
Royal Daniel: Royal Secrets. The disappearance of a local lawyer paralyses a mountain town in Colorado. Soon clues emerge that the community's idyllic veneer is not all it seems. S1, Ep4
No Place Like Home. A young professional is murdered in her apartment in Orlando. Detectives turn to CCTV footage to solve the case and bring a cold-blooded killer to justice. S6, Ep8
Murder As Seen On TV. Megan Haines was a nurse who murdered two nursing home residents by injecting them with insulin. Experts analyse the actions of this disturbing serial killer. S2, Ep4
Stage Fright. Stephanie is a gifted stage performer and much-loved teacher. But behind closed doors, resentment and envy fester in her marriage, leading to a shocking 911 call. S7, Ep7
Dance With Me. Ramon Sosa is a father of three who runs a successful boxing gym in Texas. He feels like the luckiest man alive until someone marks him for murder. S7, Ep13
The Girl In The Park. A group of men discover a woman's body in a park in Red Valley, Arizona. Investigators have leads, but can they gather enough concrete evidence? S4, Ep2
Paul, Dawn And Samantha. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the murder of three young children in 1973. Plus, a mother fights to change the law after her son is killed. S5, Ep5
Vanished From Campus. Student Christian Aguilar mysteriously vanishes from his university campus. Police are stumped until CCTV footage takes the case in a shocking new direction. S2, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programmes.show_description: True Crime Lies. A decades-old Pennsylvania murder case heats up when a Texas Ranger visits a person of interest who may hold the answers. S1, Ep5
The Serial Killer Who Only Killed Once. The weekend before Thanksgiving, a killer slays Robin Lawrence at home while her child is asleep. A relentless investigation circles her husband. S9, Ep8
Rachel Williams/Thomas Edwards. A woman's life hangs in the balance after she escapes a controlling relationship. Plus, a family are left devastated as a result of dangerous driving. S5, Ep4
A Date With Death. A padlocked suitcase is discovered in the Kent countryside. The body of a woman within tells a story of someone new to the country searching for love. S1, Ep5
Far From Home. When a young woman goes missing, her sister hopes that police will bring her home. Instead, they find her body crammed inside a suitcase, buried in a six-foot grave. S1, Ep6
Three Masked Males. In Cleveland, Texas, a man guns down Conbino Crasto during a gas station robbery. CCTV sends police on a hunt for three masked suspects. S10, Ep1
Like A Brother To Me. When police find a man left for dead in his home, they look to security video to find his killer and follow clues to track down a suspicious SUV. S10, Ep2

Trails of Evidence. How a simple clue such as dirt on shoes can place a suspect at a crime scene. Meticulous forensic investigators follow the trails of evidence leading to killers. S5, Ep2
Flames of Justice. Find out how arson investigators can retrieve important clues from scorched rubble, leading to the arsonist. S4, Ep13
Radical Resistance. The bureau investigates the activities of a Croatian terrorist group who gunned down some of their opponents and eliminated others with parcel bombs. S6, Ep16
Operation Goldenrod. In Beirut armed extremists seize a plane and terrorise everyone on board. The CIA undertakes a daring operation to stop the hijackers; but will they succeed? S6, Ep18
Paul, Dawn And Samantha. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the murder of three young children in 1973. Plus, a mother fights to change the law after her son is killed. S5, Ep5
Bound By Honor. A young woman has to hide her relationship from her orthodox father and protective brother. But, their heavenly relationship quickly becomes a hellish nightmare. S4, Ep10
Billy Smolinski: Favourite Son. Billy disappears just after finding out his girlfriend is cheating on him. Is she behind it, or will a perpetrator emerge from beyond the grave? S1, Ep5
All That It Seems. A traffic accident on the Interstate near Des Moines, Iowa, kills a young mother. Police use construction work cameras to piece together her final moments. S6, Ep9
Thief, Conwoman, Nurse Killer. Jeannie Miata was a nurse who killed a woman with a lethal dose of insulin. Experts analyse the actions and motive of this disturbing murderer. S2, Ep5
Broken Heart In Broken Arrow. Twenty-one-year-old mother, Lauren Kidd, always follows her heart. It leads her to happiness, but there's a darkness lurking that no one can stop. S7, Ep15
Put Yourself Out There. Randy Ferguson's life changes forever when he meets single mother, Angela Phillips. But the beautiful life they build together hides an ugly secret. S7, Ep20
The Move Out. Tempers flare outside a home where Savannah police officers have uncovered three dead bodies. One argument could offer a vital lead in this horrifying case. S4, Ep4
Nicola Fellows & Karen Hadaway. The murder of two children sparks a manhunt that spans three decades. Plus, the National Crime Agency attempts to thwart a gun smuggling operation. S5, Ep7
Good Samaritan. Student Kenia Monge disappears without a trace. The search hits dead ends until detectives uncover chilling surveillance footage, revealing what happened to her. S2, Ep4
Badge Of Evil. Tony believes his mother found happiness with Deputy Dave Rogers, until he sees the dark truth a man who uses his badge to terrorize and abuse. S10, Ep15
Son Of The Prophet. Reveals the devastating and often undiscussed consequences on the people who have nurtured, loved, and raised a killer. S2, Ep1
Paul, Dawn And Samantha. Barrister Robert Rinder examines the murder of three young children in 1973. Plus, a mother fights to change the law after her son is killed. S5, Ep5
